nodes.context: Organized crime organization operating in Rome, involved in corruption, racketeering, money laundering, and bid rigging.
Italian far-right terrorist group; former member Massimo Carminati was part of it.
Italian criminal organization based in Rome; former member Massimo Carminati was part of it.
Calabrian mafia-type criminal organization; members were among those investigated in the Mafia Capitale probe.

edges.evidence_quote: Among those investigated are former mayor Gianni Alemanno and the bosses Salvatore Buzzi and Massimo Carminati, a former member of Nuclei Armati Rivoluzionari and Banda della Magliana, as well as members of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.context: Members of 'Ndrangheta were investigated alongside Mafia Capitale figures, indicating a cooperative relationship.
